cards.title: Initial Documents
cards.content:
• Standard vs. Non-Standard Age Proofs
• The Proposal Form (Contract Base)
• FPR vs. RPR (Proof of Risk)
• KYC and Moral Hazard Report (MHR)

cards.title: 1. Standard Age Proofs
cards.content: Issued by Public Authority. Examples: Passport, PAN Card, Birth Certificate, School Leaving Certificate.

cards.title: 2. Non-Standard Age Proofs
cards.content: Less Reliable. Examples: Horoscope, Ration Card, Village Panchayat Certificate, Self-declaration. (Company may charge extra premium).

cards.title: 3. The Proposal Form
cards.content: The BASE of the insurance contract. Every detail must be truthful (Utmost Good Faith).

cards.title: 4. FPR (First Premium Receipt)
cards.content: Conclusive legal proof that the contract has begun and risk is covered.

cards.title: Moral Hazard Report (MHR)
cards.content: Confidential report by the Agent about the proposer's lifestyle, habits, and financial status.

sections.title: 🚀 Exam Pro-Tips (Repeated Themes)
items: Proof of Risk Commencement: First Premium Receipt (FPR).
MHR Prepared By: Insurance Agent / Official.
